description: The required or conventional filename for this skill type. For example, "SKILL.md" for Claude Code skills.

claude-code.mechanism: Fixed filename SKILL.md required inside skill directory

cline.mechanism: Fixed filename SKILL.md required inside a named skill directory

codex.mechanism: Fixed filename SKILL.md required within each named skill directory (SKILLS_FILENAME constant)

copilot-cli.mechanism: SKILL.md (fixed filename per Agent Skills open standard)

factory-droid.mechanism: SKILL.md (fixed, required filename within the skill directory)

opencode.mechanism: Fixed filename SKILL.md inside skill directory (Agent Skills spec)

pi.mechanism: SKILL.md (required, fixed filename for directory-form skills)

windsurf.mechanism: Fixed filename SKILL.md required in each skill directory. All scopes (workspace, global, system) use this same convention.
